reviews.comment:
Un restaurante como para disfrutar de una riquísima comida .El trato muy bueno .Los baños impermeables .Muy recomendado.

(Translated by Google)
A restaurant perfect for enjoying a delicious meal. Excellent service. Waterproof restrooms. Highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Podrían mejorar el trato los playeros, que les pedís un simple cepillo o secador de vidrio para limpiar el auto, ya que venimos por la ruta y consumimos en el local, combustible o bebidas, nos trataron como ladrones por un simple secador de vidrios y no lo quisieron prestar. Solo para pedir una colaboración y querer limpiar el vidrio ellos.

(Translated by Google)
The service station attendants could improve their treatment of customers. When you ask them for a simple brush or windshield squeegee to clean your car, since you've come by road and bought fuel or drinks at the station, they treated you like a thief for a simple windshield squeegee and refused to lend it to you. They only wanted to ask for a tip and then try to clean the windshield themselves.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHNTdHU2ZnEAE
